title: Vanity: Colossal Weapons
description: Expands the user's armory by providing new weapon skins, of Colossal Size. For the strongest of warriors.
body:
# Vanity: Colossal Weapons
An Addon which adds colossal variants for your Netherite weaponry.
By adding the Heavy Blacksmithing design, sold by the Stylist Villager, this Mod will allow your arsenal to be as imposing as ever, to crush your enemies with unmatched strength.

## Heavy Blacksmithing Design
A Design for Netherite Weaponry, allowing you to turn your tools into:
- Greatsword
- Flamberge
- Greataxe
- Warpick
- Military Shovel

Fan of my work? Join [My Discord](https://discord.gg/JW4utPut9x), to keep up with new project, project updates, or simply talk with a small, homely community
